senses.gloss: a dish from flour and fat and dates or honey or the like for sweetening put together and fried for festive breakfast, khabees

etymology.text: Borrowed from Aramaic חַבִיצָא / חָבִיצָא (ḥābiṣā, ḥabiṣā) / ܚܒܺܝܨܳܐ (ḥəbīṣā), same dish, from חָבַצ (ḥābaṣ) / ܚܒܰܨ (ḥbaṣ, “to beat into a pulp, to press, to squeeze”).
